ucs.title: [LLM] Conti / Wizard Spider pre-encryption sabotage chain (vssadmin + bcdedit + targeted service stop)
ucs.description: Detects the signature Conti ransomware preparation sequence: shadow-copy deletion (vssadmin/wmic), boot recovery disabling (bcdedit ignoreallfailures + recoveryenabled no), backup catalog wipe (wbadmin), and termination of backup/AV/database services (Veeam, MSSQL, Acronis, Sophos, MePoCS, Memtas) within a tight window. This three-tool combo is lifted directly from the leaked Conti operator manual and TheDFIRReport's Wizard Spider runbooks (G0102) — it is the last-mile signal before file encryption begins.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as commandlines values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parents from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("vssadmin.exe","wmic.exe","bcdedit.exe","wbadmin.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","sc.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") AND NOT match(Processes.user,".*\$$") AND (Processes.process="*delete shadows*" OR Processes.process="*shadowcopy*delete*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures*" OR Processes.process="*recoveryenabled no*" OR Processes.process="*delete catalog*" OR (Processes.process="*stop*" AND (Processes.process="*Veeam*" OR Processes.process="*MSSQL*" OR Processes.process="*Backup*" OR Processes.process="*Acronis*" OR Processes.process="*Memtas*" OR Processes.process="*Mepocs*" OR Processes.process="*Sophos*" OR Processes.process="*SQLAgent*" OR Processes.process="*Veritas*"))) by Processes.dest Processes.user _time span=10m
| where count >= 2
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`
| where firstTime >= relative_time(now(),"-7d")
| sort 0 - lastTime
ucs.kql:
let Window = 10m;
let SabotageBins = dynamic(["vssadmin.exe","wmic.exe","bcdedit.exe","wbadmin.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","sc.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where FileName in~ (SabotageBins)
| extend Action = case(
    ProcessCommandLine has "delete shadows", "vssadmin_delete_shadows",
    ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"), "wmic_shadowcopy_delete",
    ProcessCommandLine has "bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures", "bcdedit_ignore_failures",
    ProcessCommandLine has "recoveryenabled no", "bcdedit_disable_recovery",
    ProcessCommandLine has "delete catalog", "wbadmin_delete_catalog",
    ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)\b(stop|delete|disable)\b.*(veeam|memtas|mepocs|backup|sql|sophos|acronis|veritas|sqlagent|sqlwriter|msexchange)", "target_service_kill",
    ProcessCommandLine has_all ("Get-WmiObject","Win32_Shadowcopy"), "ps_vss_enum",
    ProcessCommandLine has "Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy", "ps_vss_delete",
    "")
| where isnotempty(Action)
| summarize Actions = make_set(Action),
            DistinctActions = dcount(Action),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen = max(Timestamp),
            CmdLines = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 15),
            Parents = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName)
            by DeviceName, AccountName, bin(Timestamp, Window)
| where DistinctActions >= 2
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let Window = 10m;
let SabotageBins = dynamic(["vssadmin.exe","wmic.exe","bcdedit.exe","wbadmin.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","sc.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend Bin = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
| where Bin in (SabotageBins)
| extend Action = case(
    CommandLine has "delete shadows", "vssadmin_delete_shadows",
    CommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"), "wmic_shadowcopy_delete",
    CommandLine has "bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures", "bcdedit_ignore_failures",
    CommandLine has "recoveryenabled no", "bcdedit_disable_recovery",
    CommandLine has "delete catalog", "wbadmin_delete_catalog",
    CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)\b(stop|delete|disable)\b.*(veeam|memtas|mepocs|backup|sql|sophos|acronis|veritas|sqlagent|sqlwriter|msexchange)", "target_service_kill",
    CommandLine has_all ("Get-WmiObject","Win32_Shadowcopy"), "ps_vss_enum",
    CommandLine has "Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy", "ps_vss_delete",
    "")
| where isnotempty(Action)
| summarize Actions = make_set(Action),
            DistinctActions = dcount(Action),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            CmdLines = make_set(CommandLine, 15),
            Parents = make_set(ParentProcessName)
            by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, Window)
| where DistinctActions >= 2
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Conti / Wizard Spider operators consistently chain these specific commands (the leaked Aug-2021 Conti playbook even hard-codes the bcdedit + vssadmin lines). Detecting any one in isolation is noisy (admins legitimately delete shadows on standalone repair tasks); requiring >=2 distinct sabotage-class actions on the same host within 10 minutes from a non-machine account is the Conti-shaped signal —

ucs.title: [LLM] Conti AdFind reconnaissance playbook (leaked Conti operator runbook recipes)
ucs.description: Detects the AdFind LDAP enumeration sequence published in the leaked Conti / Wizard Spider operator manual. Conti affiliates copy-paste the same recipe set (objectcategory=person/computer/organizationalUnit, -gcb -sc trustdmp, -subnets, -sc dcmodes/adinfo/dclist/exchaddresses) into a single batch script as soon as a domain foothold is established — well before lateral movement and Cobalt Strike fan-out.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmds dc(Processes.process) as distinct_recipes values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parents from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name="adfind.exe" OR Processes.original_file_name="AdFind.exe" OR Processes.process="*adfind*") AND (Processes.process="*objectcategory=person*" OR Processes.process="*objectcategory=computer*" OR Processes.process="*objectcategory=organizationalUnit*" OR Processes.process="*objectcategory=group*" OR Processes.process="*-gcb -sc trustdmp*" OR Processes.process="*-sc trustdmp*" OR Processes.process="*-sc dcmodes*" OR Processes.process="*-sc adinfo*" OR Processes.process="*-sc dclist*" OR Processes.process="*-sc exchaddresses*" OR Processes.process="*-subnets -f*") by Processes.dest Processes.user
| where distinct_recipes >= 2
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`
| where firstTime >= relative_time(now(),"-7d")
| sort 0 - lastTime
ucs.kql:
let ContiAdFindRecipes = dynamic([
    "objectcategory=person",
    "objectcategory=computer",
    "objectcategory=organizationalUnit",
    "objectcategory=group",
    "-gcb -sc trustdmp",
    "-sc trustdmp",
    "-sc dcmodes",
    "-sc adinfo",
    "-sc dclist",
    "-sc exchaddresses",
    "-subnets -f"
  ]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where (FileName =~ "adfind.exe"
         or InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "adfind.exe"
         or ProcessCommandLine has "adfind"
         or ProcessVersionInfoOriginalFileName =~ "AdFind.exe")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (ContiAdFindRecipes)
| extend RecipeMatched = tostring(set_intersect(
        split(tolower(ProcessCommandLine), " "),
        ContiAdFindRecipes))
| summarize FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen = max(Timestamp),
            DistinctRecipes = dcount(ProcessCommandLine),
            Cmds = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 25),
            Parents = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName),
            ParentCmds = make_set(InitiatingProcessCommandLine, 5)
            by DeviceName, AccountName
| where DistinctRecipes >= 2
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let ContiAdFindRecipes = dynamic([
    "objectcategory=person",
    "objectcategory=computer",
    "objectcategory=organizationalUnit",
    "objectcategory=group",
    "-gcb -sc trustdmp",
    "-sc trustdmp",
    "-sc dcmodes",
    "-sc adinfo",
    "-sc dclist",
    "-sc exchaddresses",
    "-subnets -f"
  ]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where NewProcessName endswith "\\adfind.exe"
     or CommandLine has "adfind"
| where CommandLine has_any (ContiAdFindRecipes)
| summarize FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            DistinctRecipes = dcount(CommandLine),
            Cmds = make_set(CommandLine, 25),
            Parents = make_set(ParentProcessName)
            by Computer, Account
| where DistinctRecipes >= 2
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Conti Wizard Spider AdFind Reconnaissance Playbook
id: 7c2c4f1a-8d9b-4e2f-9a44-c0n71adf1nd00
status: experimental
description: Detects AdFind LDAP enumeration recipes copied verbatim from the leaked Conti / Wizard Spider operator playbook (G0102). Multiple recipes within minutes of each other indicate active hands-on intrusion in the discovery phase, immediately preceding Cobalt Strike lateral movement.
references:
  - https://thedfirreport.com/2021/05/12/conti-ransomware/
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0102/
  - Leaked Conti playbook ("Manuals_For_Operators", August 2021)
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2024/01/15
tags:
  - attack.discovery
  - attack.t1087.002
  - attack.t1018
  - attack.t1482
  - attack.t1069.002
  - attack.g0102
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_img:
    - Image|endswith: '\adfind.exe'
    - OriginalFileName: 'AdFind.exe'
    - CommandLine|contains: 'adfind'
  selection_recipe:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'objectcategory=person'
      - 'objectcategory=computer'
      - 'objectcategory=organizationalUnit'
      - 'objectcategory=group'
      - '-gcb -sc trustdmp'
      - '-sc trustdmp'
      - '-sc dcmodes'
      - '-sc adinfo'
      - '-sc dclist'
      - '-sc exchaddresses'
      - '-subnets -f'
  condition: 1 of selection_img and selection_recipe
fields:
  - Image
  - CommandLine
  - ParentImage
  - User
  - Computer
falsepositives:
  - Sanctioned blue-team / pentest tooling explicitly using AdFind with these recipes
  - IT auditors running scripted AD discovery (rare, should be allowlisted by host/account)
level: high
ucs.rationale: AdFind is not a Microsoft binary and is rarely sanctioned. The specific argument bundle ('-gcb -sc trustdmp', '-sc dcmodes', '-sc exchaddresses' alongside the four objectcategory recipes) was published verbatim in the August-2021 Conti playbook leak and observed in dozens of TheDFIRReport / Mandiant Conti / Ryuk / BazarCall intrusions attributed to Wizard Spider (UNC1878, FIN12). Requiring >=2 dis
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID
